## Checklist

- [ ] The work is within the scope of multimodal deep search.
- [ ] The description explains why the item is useful.
- [ ] The item is alphabetized within the correct section.
- [ ] Reported results include the model and evaluation setting.
- [ ] Benchmark notes and JSON data are updated when applicable.
- [ ] `npx awesome-lint` passes.
